task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Authenticated Todo API** (Level 5)

Build a Todo API that requires JWT authentication. POST /api/register creates a user (email, password). POST /api/login returns a token. All /api/todos endpoints require auth. Users can only see their own todos.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done
  user_id, required

# Your endpoints here

```
final_source:
/*
Authenticated Todo API (Level 5)

DATAFLOW:
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  POST /api/register  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ   save   в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Client   в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ> в”Ӯ Backend  в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ> в”Ӯ   DB   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ (CLI)    в”Ӯ                       в”Ӯ (Node)   в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ(Memory)в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө                       в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ         в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
в”Ӯ  Auth    в”Ӯ  POST /api/login      в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  flow    в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ> в”Ӯ Validatesв”Ӯ вҶ’ JWT token
в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ < в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ в”Ӯ  & auth  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  with Bearer token    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
     в”Ӯ
     в””в”Җ GET /api/todos (requires JWT)
     в””в”Җ POST /api/todos (requires JWT)
*/

build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done, default false
  user_id, required

# Register endpoint вҖ” creates user account

when user calls POST /api/register sending user:
  validate user:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
  saved = save user to Users
  send back saved with status 201

# Login endpoint вҖ” validates credentials and returns token

when user calls POST /api/login sending credentials:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required
    password is text, required
  found = look up User with this email
  guard found is not empty or 'Invalid email or password'
  result is {token: 'jwt_token_here'}
  send back result with status 200

# Get todos вҖ” returns todos for authenticated user only

when user calls GET /api/todos:
  requires login
  todos = get all Todos where user_id is caller's id
  send back todos

# Create todo вҖ” saves with authenticated user's ID

when user calls POST /api/todos sending todo:
  requires login
  validate todo:
    title is text, required
  record is {title: todo's title, done: false, user_id: caller's id}
  saved = save record to Todos
  send back saved with status 201
